topPlaces.name: Appikonda
topPlaces.description: Appikonda is a neighborhood situated on the southern part of Visakhapatnam City, India, and is about 30 km from the Visakhapatnam . Appikonda is known for the Someswara Swamy Temple.

topPlaces.name: Vizag Thermal Power Station
topPlaces.description: Hinduja National Thermal Power Station, Vizag is a coal-based thermal power plant located in Palavalasa village in Visakhapatnam district, Andhra Pradesh. The power plant is owned by Hinduja National Power Company Limited, a subsidiary of the Hinduja Group.

topPlaces.name: Andhra Pradesh Medtech Zone
topPlaces.description: Andhra Pradesh MedTech Zone (AMTZ) is the medical technology park with Common Manufacturing Facilities & Common Scientific Facilities located in Nadupuru village area of Visakhapatnam, adjacent to the Visakhapatnam Steel Plant. The AMTZ is spread over an area of 270 acres and it has over 10 manufacturing units.

topPlaces.name: Devada
topPlaces.description: Devada is a suburb in Visakhapatnam City, India. It falls under the jurisdiction Pedagantyada mandal of Visakhapatnam Dist and a part of GVMC. It is a part of Pendurthi assembly constituency.

topPlaces.name: Gangavaram Port
topPlaces.description: Gangavaram Port is a port located in Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh. Inaugurated in July 2009, it has a depth of 21m.

topPlaces.name: Desapatrunipalem
topPlaces.description: Desapatrunipalem is a suburb situated in Visakhapatnam City, India. The area, which falls within the local administrative limits of Greater Visakhapatnam Municipal Corporation, is quite close to the Visakhapatnam Steel Plant site.

topPlaces.name: Simhadri Super Thermal Power Station
topPlaces.description: Simhadri Super Thermal Power Plant is a coal-fired power plant located in the outskirts of Anakapalli city in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. The power plant is one of the coal-fired power plants of NTPC, a Government of India enterprise.

topPlaces.name: Gangavaram, Visakhapatnam
topPlaces.description: Gangavaram is a suburban area in Visakhapatnam.

Gangavaram Port is a port located in Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh. Inaugurated in July 2009, it has a depth of 21m.

Desapatrunipalem is a suburb situated in Visakhapatnam City, India. The area, which falls within the local administrative limits of Greater Visakhapatnam Municipal Corporation, is quite close to the Visakhapatnam Steel Plant site.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Someswara Swamy Temple, Appikonda?
faq.a: The best time to visit Someswara Swamy Temple, Appikonda is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Someswara Swamy Temple, Appikonda?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Visakhapatnam Airport (17 km) and the nearest railway station is Visakhapatnam Junction (22 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Someswara Swamy Temple, Appikonda?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Someswara Swamy Temple, Appikonda at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Someswara Swamy Temple, Appikonda?
faq.a: Stays in Someswara Swamy Temple, Appikonda start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Someswara Swamy Temple, Appikonda?
faq.a: The top attractions are Appikonda, Vizag Thermal Power Station, Andhra Pradesh Medtech Zone, Devada, Gangavaram Port.
